title: CI: figure out caching of go modules/build cache
body:
Investigate setting up proper caching of the build and/or mdule cache if needed, the default setup-go action can do that but that only cahces the host, we would like to configure a setup that works for the builds in the lima VM as well.


For podman specially we used to upload the compiled binaries for the build task and then download them again on each real test task, I tried that with download/upload artifact but it messed up the timestamps so make had to rebuild anyway.
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/138879058b8405242341630e7578e94a8e40481a/.github/workflows/lima.yml#L43-L49
